# Navatech - Hospitality Growth Partner in Morocco

Navatech turns your website, WhatsApp, and Google profile into a direct-booking engine. We help independent riads, boutique hotels, and guesthouses in Morocco reduce their dependence on Online Travel Agencies (OTAs) like Booking.com, save on commissions (15-25%), and regain control of their customer relationships.

## Core Packages

1. Foundation (1,500 — 8,500 MAD):
   - Optimized FR/EN Website
   - Google & AI Visibility (AEO)
   - Direct WhatsApp booking flow
   - GA4 Configuration

2. Closer (9,500 — 15,500 MAD):
   - Everything in Foundation
   - 24/7 AI Qualification Assistant on the website

3. Commander (19,500 — 28,000 MAD):
   - Everything in Closer
   - SmartPath integration: WhatsApp Concierge, Reviews & Upsells Automations

## Free Digital Audit
We offer a manual digital maturity audit (visibility, friction, speed). Request it at /audit or /en/audit.

## Profitability Simulator
Calculate potential savings by redirecting OTA bookings to direct channels: /simulateur or /en/simulator.
